heading: Advance payments for computer programing services
label: 6619 Advance payments for computer programing services
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Sergeant at Arms and Doorkeeper of the Senate, subject to the approval of the Committee on Rules and Administration, is on and after , authorized to enter into contracts which provide for the making of advance payments for computer programing services.July 6, 1981
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 123c–1 of this title
